goal: Build a CLI installer (with deps: commander, inquirer) that sets up atelier hooks and agents for Claude Code and OpenCode

tasks.name: Prepare agent files as templates
tasks.description: Remove harness-specific fields (model) from agent files. Keep only name, description. These become the canonical templates fetched by the CLI.

tests: No model field in agent frontmatter

tasks.name: CLI entry point and argument parsing
tasks.description: Create bin/atelier.js with commander. Commands: init, update, remove. Flags: --harness, --all, --yes. Update package.json with bin entry and dependencies (commander, inquirer).

acceptance: package.json has bin entry and deps

tasks.name: Harness detection utility
tasks.description: Create src/utils/detect.js. Detects harness from env vars, directory presence, or CLI availability. Returns 'claude', 'opencode', or null. --harness flag overrides detection.

tasks.name: Config read/write utility
tasks.description: Create src/utils/config.js. readConfig() and writeConfig(). Creates .atelier/ dir. Validates JSON schema. Handles missing config.

tasks.name: GitHub fetch utility
tasks.description: Create src/utils/fetch.js. fetchText(url) using built-in fetch. Handles 404s, network errors. GitHub base URL constant.

tasks.name: Agent template fetching
tasks.description: Create src/utils/templates.js. Fetches agent templates from GitHub. Parses YAML frontmatter and markdown body. Returns {frontmatter, body} object.

tasks.name: Model registry
tasks.description: Create src/models.json with available models per harness. Raw model names, no abstraction.

tests: Lists opencode-go/* and opencode/* for opencode

tasks.name: Claude Code generator
tasks.description: Create src/generators/claude.js. Generates .claude/settings.json (model + hooks), hooks/atelier-session-start, and .claude/agents/*.md. Injects model into agent frontmatter. Settings merges with existing. Hook reads skills path from config.

tests: Merges settings without overwriting existing fields

tasks.name: OpenCode generator
tasks.description: Create src/generators/opencode.js. Generates .opencode/plugins/atelier.js and .opencode/agents/*.md. Injects model into agent frontmatter. Plugin registers skills paths and injects bootstrap.

tests: Generates .opencode/agents/*.md with mode: subagent and injected model

tasks.name: init command - detection and config
tasks.description: Implement init harness detection and config creation. Handles fresh install vs re-run. Detects harness, reads/writes config, detects harness switching.

tasks.name: init command - interactive prompts
tasks.description: Implement interactive model selection. Uses inquirer select prompts. Shows current model as default. Skipped with --yes flag (uses first model in list).

acceptance: Model selection works interactively and non-interactively

tasks.name: init command - file generation
tasks.description: Implement init file generation. Calls appropriate generator based on harness. Generates hook and all agent files. Overwrites existing.

tasks.name: update command
tasks.description: Implement update. Reads config, re-fetches templates, regenerates hook and agents. Preserves model selections. Does not touch skills.

tasks.name: remove command
tasks.description: Implement remove. Reads config, deletes generated files, deletes .atelier/ directory. Optionally removes skills with --remove-skills.

tasks.name: Error handling
tasks.description: Add comprehensive error handling. Network errors, GitHub 404s, invalid configs, missing skills CLI. Clear error messages with next steps.

tasks.name: End-to-end test
tasks.description: Test full workflow: init -> verify files -> update -> verify -> remove -> verify cleaned. Test both harnesses.

acceptance: Full cycle works in temp directory
